name: Olmesartan
executiveSummary: ARB (angiotensin II receptor blocker) for arterial hypertension and combinations with diuretics or calcium channel blockers.
indications:
## Indications

- Essential arterial hypertension.
- Institutional combination regimens (olmesartan + HCTZ or amlodipine).

## Precautions

- Contraindicated in pregnancy. Olmesartan-associated enteropathy (rare, chronic).

> Adjust according to institutional protocols and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 20–40 mg/day PO as a single dose.

stability:
## Stability

- Store according to package insert.
adverseEffects:
## Effects

- Dizziness, hypotension, hyperkalemia, chronic diarrhea (rare).

bibliography.citation: ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Argentine Society of Cardiology. Clinical practice guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
